title: Junior Frontend Developer
description: HashiCorp is seeking a Junior Frontend Developer to build user interfaces for infrastructure-as-code tools. You'll work with React, develop responsive UIs, and collaborate with design and backend teams. Work remotely for the company making infrastructure automation accessible to everyone.
responsibilities: Build interactive user interfaces using React and modern JavaScript
Implement responsive designs that work across browsers and devices
Collaborate with designers to translate designs into code
Write clean, maintainable code with comprehensive tests
Optimize frontend performance and user experience

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field (or equivalent experience)
